title: AgentSimNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-agent-sim-server (agent-based / cellular-automata simulation: Game of Life, boids, SIR epidemics, Schelling segregation). The server subscribes to simulate requests under the dd-agent-sim-server queue group, publishes per-tick frames for live streaming (also bridged to websockets via RuntimeEvents/WebsocketEvents) and a final result plus runtime events. Payloads carry an agent_sim.simulate.v1 schemaVersion envelope and must not contain secrets.

subjects.name: AgentSimSimulateRequests
subjects.description: Inbound agent-based / cellular-automata simulation requests consumed by the agent-sim server. Subscribed with the dd-agent-sim-server queue group so requests load-balance across replicas. Default for AGENT_SIM_SIMULATE_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.agent_sim.simulate.requests

subjects.name: AgentSimFrames
subjects.description: Per-tick simulation frames fanned out for live demos (grid/agent snapshots and aggregate stats). Broadcast with no queue group so every interested consumer (and the websocket bridge) receives each frame. Default for AGENT_SIM_FRAME_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.agent_sim.frames

subjects.name: AgentSimSimulateResults
subjects.description: Final simulation outcomes (final state summary, time series, convergence/extinction flags) emitted after a run completes. Carries an agent_sim.simulate.v1 envelope. Default for AGENT_SIM_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.agent_sim.simulate.results

queueGroups.name: AgentSimServerQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by dd-agent-sim-server replicas consuming simulate requests.
